missingWords: durée de la conservation (ou) durée de conservation

responseHeaders.feature-policy: geolocation 'none', clipboard-read 'none', payment 'none', document-domain 'none', camera 'none', microphone 'none', usb 'none', serial 'none'
responseHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self' https://api-www.louvre.fr;base-uri 'self';style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com;script-src 'self' 'strict-dynamic' 'unsafe-inline' https://tag.aticdn.net https://www.youtube.com 'nonce-3a375f36-b940-464a-bcca-66370bf42cf2';img-src 'self' data: https://api-www.louvre.fr https://i.ytimg.com https://i.vimeocdn.com;media-src 'self' https://api-www.louvre.fr https://*.ausha.co https://*.radiofrance-podcast.net;connect-src 'self' https://api-www.louvre.fr fxxslpn.pa-cd.com https://e.clarity.ms;frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://player.vimeo.com https://livemap.getwemap.com https://embed.radiofrance.fr/;frame-ancestors 'none';form-action 'self' https://api-www.louvre.fr;manifest-src 'self';font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com;object-src 'none';upgrade-insecure-requests
responseHeaders.access-control-allow-headers: Origin, Accept, Content-Type, X-Requested-With, X-CSRF-Token, Authorization, Access-Control-Allow-Origin, Req.Http.Origin, Cors

runWarnings: The page may not be loading as expected because your test URL (https://louvre.fr/) was redirected to https://www.louvre.fr/. Try testing the second URL directly.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: These checks highlight opportunities to [improve the accessibility of your web app](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/accessibility/). Automatic detection can only detect a subset of issues and does not guarantee the accessibility of your web app, so [manual testing](https://web.dev/articles/how-to-review) is also encouraged.
accessibility.manualDescription: These items address areas which an automated testing tool cannot cover. Learn more in our guide on [conducting an accessibility review](https://web.dev/articles/how-to-review).

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: These checks ensure that your page is following basic search engine optimization advice. There are many additional factors Lighthouse does not score here that may affect your search ranking, including performance on [Core Web Vitals](https://web.dev/explore/vitals). [Learn more about Google Search Essentials](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/35769).
seo.manualDescription: Run these additional validators on your site to check additional SEO best practices.

technologies.name: Node.js
technologies.description: Node.js is an open-source, cross-platform, JavaScript runtime environment that executes JavaScript code outside a web browser.

technologies.name: React
technologies.description: React is an open-source JavaScript library for building user interfaces or UI components.

technologies.name: Next.js
technologies.description: Next.js is a React framework for developing single page Javascript applications.

technologies.name: Google Tag Manager
technologies.description: Google Tag Manager is a tag management system (TMS) that allows you to quickly and easily update measurement codes and related code fragments collectively known as tags on your website or mobile app.

technologies.name: Microsoft Advertising
technologies.description: Microsoft Advertising is an online advertising platform developed by Microsoft.

technologies.name: Matomo Analytics
technologies.description: Matomo Analytics is a free and open-source web analytics application, that runs on a PHP/MySQL web-server.

technologies.name: HSTS
technologies.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) informs browsers that the site should only be accessed using HTTPS.

technologies.name: Zendesk
technologies.description: Zendesk is a cloud-based help desk management solution offering customizable tools to build customer service portal, knowledge base and online communities.

technologies.name: Mailjet
technologies.description: Mailjet is an email delivery service for marketing and developer teams.

technologies.name: MailChimp
technologies.description: Mailchimp is a marketing automation platform and email marketing service.

technologies.name: Webpack
technologies.description: Webpack is an open-source JavaScript module bundler.

technologies.name: PWA
technologies.description: Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) are web apps built and enhanced with modern APIs to deliver enhanced capabilities, reliability, and installability while reaching anyone, anywhere, on any device, all with a single codebase.

technologies.name: Open Graph
technologies.description: Open Graph is a protocol that is used to integrate any web page into the social graph.

technologies.name: Module Federation
technologies.description: Module Federation is a webpack technology for dynamically loading parts of other independently deployed builds.
